summary: Sprint planning session to define the next two-week scope. The meeting notes feature is the top priority, starting with offline transcription. Energy VAD will be used initially, with Silero migration planned for the following sprint.
key_decisions: Offline transcription ships first before realtime
Energy VAD in sprint 1, Silero migration in sprint 2
Dual-track mixer approach for speaker attribution
action_items: Implement hermes-audio crate with dual-track mixer
Wire SttEngine to meeting notes tool
Test ONNX runtime compatibility on Windows in week one
Write eval scripts for WER and notes recall
risks: ONNX runtime may not be compatible with Windows
AISHELL-4 audio not yet downloaded — WER test needs stub initially
follow_ups: WER target: below 8% for Mandarin; action item recall target: above 80%
